venue_scope.title: Advanced Engineering Informatics: Aims and Scope
venue_scope.operational_requirement: Explicit knowledge representation and use, engineering relevance, and vigorous evaluation of generality, power, and scalability.

methods.title: Knowledge graph-driven methodology for complex product architecture solution generation and simulation verification
methods.knowledge_representation: Knowledge graph integrating product data, experience, constraints, and requirements
methods.synthesis_scope: Architecture alternatives generated, optimized, and matched to requirements
methods.validation_scope: Mechanism simulation in a launch-vehicle separation-system case study
methods.closest_overlap: Graph-driven solution generation with constraints and simulation validation
methods.remaining_difference: Accessible paper metadata does not report blind solver/evaluator separation, independent certificates, exhaustive negative proofs, or hash-bound artifacts

methods.title: Knowledge-driven automated design of industrial robots: A unified graph-based framework with multi-engine reasoning
methods.knowledge_representation: Unified graph representation with domain knowledge and multiple reasoning engines
methods.synthesis_scope: Robot topology, component recommendation, and parametric CAD generation
methods.validation_scope: Application case and generated CAD models
methods.closest_overlap: Graph reasoning bridges requirements, topology, component choice, and CAD
methods.remaining_difference: Accessible paper metadata does not report independently checkable per-design certificates or complete infeasibility proofs

methods.title: Automation of gearbox design
methods.knowledge_representation: Norms, guidelines, standard tables, and component catalogs embedded in a systematic method
methods.synthesis_scope: Weight-optimized helical gearbox sizing across gears, shafts, and bearings
methods.validation_scope: Analytical load capacity and component life calculations in an established design program
methods.closest_overlap: Requirements-to-gearbox automation with coupled engineering constraints
methods.remaining_difference: Focuses detailed component sizing rather than certificate-bearing bounded topology synthesis and independent truth adjudication

methods.title: Topological Graph Representation and Configuration Synthesis for Power-Split Hybrid Transmissions of Multi-Planetary Gear Trains
methods.knowledge_representation: Topological graph and standard structure matrix
methods.synthesis_scope: Multi-planetary power-split hybrid transmission configuration generation and isomorphism screening
methods.validation_scope: Three-PGT design example and mechanical-interference screening
methods.closest_overlap: Graph representation, topology synthesis, and structural screening in a gear-transmission domain
methods.remaining_difference: Different planetary-transmission family; no reported independent certificate boundary, negative proof corpus, or CAE-coupled admission

methods.title: Multi-objective macro-geometry optimization of a compound planetary geartrain for an electric tractor powertrain using NSGA-II
methods.knowledge_representation: Parametric macro-geometry and explicit kinematic, packaging, contact-ratio, and ISO 6336 strength constraints
methods.synthesis_scope: NSGA-II optimization of module, pressure angle, helix angle, and face width with fixed topology and tooth counts
methods.validation_scope: Commercial MASTA analysis using representative workload data; physical validation left as future work
methods.closest_overlap: Gear-specific strength-constrained digital optimization and workload-aware analysis
methods.remaining_difference: Optimizes a fixed planetary architecture rather than requirements-first topology and tooth-count synthesis with independent proofs

methods.title: When architecture meets AI: A deep reinforcement learning approach for system of systems design
methods.knowledge_representation: Combinatorial system/task graph with capability and assignment constraints
methods.synthesis_scope: Actor-critic architecture selection and task allocation with generalization experiments
methods.validation_scope: Comparison with genetic and differential-evolution heuristics across problem scales
methods.closest_overlap: Learning-guided constrained graph design and scalability evaluation
methods.remaining_difference: Optimizes SoS assignments; does not provide artifact-level engineering certificates or bounded infeasibility proofs

methods.title: Engineering knowledge formalization and proposition for informatics development towards a CAD-integrated DfX system for product design
methods.knowledge_representation: Ontology that converts tacit DfX guidance into explicit reusable engineering knowledge
methods.synthesis_scope: CAD-integrated design guidance rather than autonomous bounded synthesis
methods.validation_scope: Method and knowledge-base development for product-design use
methods.closest_overlap: Explicit computable engineering knowledge intended to reduce downstream redesign
methods.remaining_difference: Knowledge formalization is the contribution; independently certified requirements-first search is not reported in accessible metadata

methods.title: Integrating and navigating engineering design decision-related knowledge using decision knowledge graph
methods.knowledge_representation: Decision knowledge graph grounded in compromise Decision Support Problems
methods.synthesis_scope: Semantic integration and navigation of decision knowledge
methods.validation_scope: Supply-chain design retrieval case compared with keyword search
methods.closest_overlap: Formal graph representation of engineering decision variables and relationships
methods.remaining_difference: Supports knowledge retrieval rather than generation and independent certification of physical designs

methods.title: Integrating a constraint-based optimization approach into the design of oil & gas structures
methods.knowledge_representation: Constraint satisfaction model linked to a collaborative engineer-to-order product structure
methods.synthesis_scope: MiniZinc-supported parameter-space reduction and optimization of a large steel structure
methods.validation_scope: Model-based mechanical simulation with reported weight and cost effects in a generic 700-ton case
methods.closest_overlap: Executable constraints coupled to model-based simulation during engineering design optimization
methods.remaining_difference: Optimizes one structural parameterization; no reported blind benchmark, independent certificate boundary, or complete infeasibility evidence

methods.title: Portia spider algorithm: an evolutionary computation approach for engineering application
methods.knowledge_representation: Four integer tooth-count variables in a standard gear-ratio optimization benchmark
methods.synthesis_scope: Metaheuristic minimization of ratio error over tooth counts
methods.validation_scope: Best objective comparison with other metaheuristics
methods.remaining_difference: No enclosure geometry, mesh graph, independent validity certificate, negative proof, or structural admission

claim_register.claim: GearRL implements a machine-readable requirements-first schema and directed gear-mesh knowledge model with independently checkable certificates for a bounded compound spur-gear family.
claim_register.required_evidence: Curated benchmark, blind synthesis boundary, validator corpus, and exact oracle

claim_register.claim: Static tooth-root screening can alter accepted design parameters and modeled feasibility under the declared digital model.

Within the audited closest-method set, no single method combines blind bounded synthesis, independent positive certificates and negative proofs, strength-coupled admission, and hash-bound publication artifacts.
claim_register.required_evidence: This matrix plus repository evidence; phrase as a bounded literature inference, not a universal first claim

claim_register.claim: GearRL provides manufacturing-ready, fatigue-qualified, physically validated, or generally superior gearbox designs.
Learning improves synthesis speed or valid-within-budget rate at the preregistered threshold.
claim_register.required_evidence: Retain only after the 30-seed learned-policy gate passes
